steps.title: Factor the left side
steps.content: Notice that $$3x-27=3(x-9)$$ So the equation becomes $$3(x-9)=24$$

steps.title: Solve only for the requested expression
steps.content: Divide by $3$: $$x-9=8$$ The question asks for $x-9$, so you can stop here.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $8$ is correct. $24$ is the value of $3x-27$, not the value of $x-9$.
